nasb.text: And He was transfigured before them; and His face shone like the sun, and His garments became as white as light.

esv.text: And he was transfigured before them, and his face shone like the sun, and his clothes became white as light.

cnv.text: 耶穌在他們面前改變了形象，臉好像太陽一樣照耀，衣服潔白像光。

ccb.text: 耶稣在他们面前改变了形象，面貌如太阳一样发光，衣服洁白如光。

csbs.text: 在他们面前，耶稣变了形像，脸面光耀如日，衣服洁白如光。
